pr.title: Decomp cleanup: type six matched wins

summary: Converts 6 already-matched functions across TRKNub.c, gs_model.c, hsd_shadow.c, battle_scene.c, and gs_field_world.c from raw offset-pointer casts to typed struct field access, preserving byte-exact matches while removing pointer-arithmetic debt. Report-only progress numbers updated alongside.
decomp_lessons: Typing a previously byte-matched raw-pointer function (e.g. `*(u32*)(ptr+0x10)` -> `struct->field`) is safe cleanup as long as the struct layout exactly reproduces the original offsets/sizes and the objdiff match is re-verified per function -- this PR treats it as a distinct 'cleanup' category separate from new matches.

TRKNub.c's TRK debug-message ring buffer (mutex/inUse/length/position/data[0x880]) was still raw offset math (buf+0xC, buf+0x8, buf+writepos+0x10) despite being matched; introducing TRKMessageBuffer struct clarified the real field semantics (length vs position) without touching codegen.

Partial/opaque structs with `u8 unk_00[N]` padding fields are the standard pattern here for typing a struct when only one field at a known offset is actually used/matched (see BattleSceneTransitionState, GSFieldWorldResourceState, HSDShadowOwner/Object/Data).
smart_moves: Used per-function match_scan_file.py checks after each typing change instead of a full regression build, since the Mac dev box cannot run the Windows mwcceppc.exe directly for whole-file batch verification.
Kept struct definitions minimal/local to each source file rather than centralizing them, since offsets are function-specific inferred struct shapes rather than confirmed full struct layouts.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Verified each retyped function individually via `tools/match_scan_file.py <file> <fn>` rather than trusting a full-repo regression pass, because the local build environment could not execute the Windows compiler binary for a full verify_commit.py regression run.
naming_conventions: BattleSceneTransitionState { u8 unk_00[0x3C]; u8 phase; } for battle_scene.c's lbl_8047B3D4.
GSFieldWorldResourceState { u8 unk_00[0x10]; u32 field_10; } for gs_field_world.c's lbl_804083D0.
GSModelStateHeader { count, entryHandle, unk_04, entries } with GS_MODEL_STATE macro cast of lbl_80404ACC in gs_model.c.
HSDShadowOwner/HSDShadowObject/HSDShadowData chain (object/shadow/width/height) in hsd_shadow.c replacing raw void*/u8* offset casts.
TRKMessageBuffer { mutex, inUse, length, position, data[0x880] } for TRKNub.c's debug message ring buffer.

key_files.role: fn_800BED14/fn_800BEDA0 retyped to use new TRKMessageBuffer struct (length/position/data) instead of raw buf+0x8/0xC/0x10 offset casts.
fn_80105410 retyped to use GS_MODEL_STATE macro/GSModelStateHeader struct instead of raw lbl_80404ACC+0x0/0x2/0x8 casts.
fn_801B16C0 retyped through HSDShadowOwner->object->shadow->width/height chain instead of nested void*/u8* offset casts.
fn_801D0080 retyped to BattleSceneTransitionState->phase instead of u8* offset 0x3c cast.
fn_80117AD4 retyped to GSFieldWorldResourceState->field_10 instead of raw u32* offset 0x10 cast.
